form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 5th (Fr3) over 1730m at this track was 3rd-8.21 at the bell, beaten 1.2 m by Borrowed Time (2:04.30) in NR up to 63 on April 8 at $41. Before that 5th (Fr1) over 2260m after showing early speed at this track was 7th-9.43 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Holy Camp Dillon (2:45.30) in NR up to 62 on April 1 at $19. Wait until he shows more.

form.formComment: Last start on from midfield and won by a head (Fr2) at this track (2:02.60) beating Tasbmiki in NR up to 57 on April 1 at $4.60 at the bell was 3rd-4.66. Big chance to go back-to-back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start on from midfield and won by a head (Fr2) at this track (2:02.60) beating Tasbmiki in NR up to 57 on April 1 at $4.60 at the bell was 3rd-4.66. Big chance to go back-to-back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten 24.3m.
Inconvenienced at the 700m when Pops Legacy broke stride.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 8th-15.67 beaten 17 m by She The Devil (2:02.60) in NR up to 57 on April 1 at $26. Showed ability the race before when she won by 2.75 m (Sr1) at this track (2:47.10) beating Rockin In Paradise in NR up to 58 on March 27 at $5.50. Sure to be very competitive.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard during the early and middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 7th (Fr2) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 10th-22.55 beaten 4 m by Borrowed Time (2:04.30) in NR up to 63 on April 8 at $5. The start before 10th (Fr6) over 1720m after being wide early at Penrith, beaten 40 m by Nosaer (2:01.60) in NR up to 67 on March 5 at $10. Nicely placed to find a bit of form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began badly as the start was effected.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 6 m finishing fourth behind The Metal Flyer at Penrith over 1720m in a NR up to 90 on March 26 at $21. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Double It Harry at Penrith over 1720m in a NR up to 65 on April 9 at $11. Looks ready to win.

form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 9th (Fr4) over 1730m at this track beaten 19 m by Domus Angeli (2:08.70) in MAIDEN on March 5 2025 at $8.50. Might be better for this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 9th (Fr4) over 1730m at this track beaten 19 m by Domus Angeli (2:08.70) in MAIDEN on March 5 2025 at $8.50. Might be better for this run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Finished in 9th and last position beaten 32m.
Hung in under pressure over the final 100m.

form.formComment: Seven-year-old entire showed improvement last time. Was well back in the run when 3rd (Fr7) over 1730m at this track was 7th-15.1 at the bell, beaten 4 m by Studleigh Melise (2:03.70) in NR up to 58 on April 8 at $31. The run before was not as impressive when well beaten into seventh after being driven well back, behind Holy Camp Dillon at this track over 2260m in a NR up to 62 on April 1 at $19. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in under pressure upon entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start and went on to finish a respectable sixth over 1730m at this track last time out. Two runs back was well back in the run when 8th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 8th-23.62 beaten 19 m by Lochinvar Jag (2:03.80) in NR up to 68 on April 1 at $8.50. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait shortly after the start was effected.
Shifted wider to obtain clear running at the 600m has inconvenienced Terryrama.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 8 m finishing fifth behind Kadar at Eugowra over 1700m in a NR up to 55 on October 6 at $5.50. Previous preparation first-up won by a nose (Sr2) at this track (2:02.60) beating Papa Joe in 3yo 2 WINs on July 9 at $3. Going okay so keep him safe.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing fourth after being driven well back, behind Holy Camp Dillon at this track over 2260m in a NR up to 62 on April 1 at $11. Then a handy effort when a close third after being driven well back, behind Borrowed Time at this track over 1730m in a NR up to 63 on April 8 at $15. Capable of testing this line-up.
